languageStrings.FL_MODULES_HELPINFO: When no modules are selected, the template is available in all modules.
languageStrings.FL_IS_SYSTEM_HELPINFO: Hidden in manual record email compose; workflows, cron, and notifications still resolve templates by sys_name.
languageStrings.LBL_SAVE_TEMPLATE_FIRST: Save the template first to add attachments.
languageStrings.LBL_EMAILTEMPLATE_ATTACHMENT_INVALID_DOC: Only active internal document files can be attached.
languageStrings.LBL_TEMPLATE_ACCOUNTS_GLOBAL_HINT: No accounts linked — this template applies to all clients (global fallback).
languageStrings.LBL_ERR_SYS_NAME_REQUIRED: Short name is required for recruitment project templates.
languageStrings.LBL_ERR_SYS_NAME_TOO_LONG: Short name must be at most 50 characters.
languageStrings.LBL_ERR_SYS_NAME_MATRIX_IN_USE: This short name is used in the recruitment transition mail matrix and cannot be changed or deleted.
languageStrings.LBL_ERR_SYS_NAME_ACCOUNT_OVERLAP: Another template already uses this short name for the same account (or global slot).

jsLanguageStrings.JS_TEMPLATE_AI_HELP_TEXT: Create HTML using only FreeCRM Template CSS classes: fc-doc, container, row, col-4, col-6, col-8, col-12, card, card-header, card-body, table, table-sm, table-bordered, table-striped, text-left, text-center, text-right, text-muted, font-bold, mt-1/2/3, mb-1/2/3, p-1/2/3, alert, badge, signature, img-logo. Avoid flex, grid, JavaScript and external CSS.
